pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take: **Ghost Pepper and Bubba G clash today, but Devin, look at me—nobody drafts Bosnia in the hopes of glory!** The exquisite unpredictability and flair of Senegal should have Devin shaking in his boots like a rookie at a World Cup debut, and Norway's overreliance on the one-trick pony that is Erling Haaland won't save you today, my friend. Let me tell you something, Devin: your courage falters when you entrust your destiny to the underwhelming USA and Bosnia, a move that screams of desperation and blatant lack of foresight. Meanwhile, Bubba G sits atop the standings like the King of the Hill, having smartly drafted the likes of France and Morocco, proving once again that he's got the grit of a '94-era battle-hardened gladiator. When Senegal steps onto that East Rutherford pitch, expect Norway to crumble like your fragile fantasies of world domination. The smart money says Bubba G walks away with victory, leaving you, Ghost Pepper, to reassess your entire existence. Mic drop.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner surges to the top, but Rafe's chaos keeps everyone on their toes!
Rafe's draft dumpster fire still smolders, but this kid's got guts, not brains.
Rafe toys with Devin; Gayden's still trying to figure out who's grounded here.
Sim predictions fumbled, yet Rafe's chaos still gives Gunner nightmares.
